title: Complicated crafting table
description: This mod makes the crafting table more difficult and adds items such as a saw, scissors, hammer (only as a crafting table item) and a crafting panel. This mod also adds crafting recipes for wood and stone picks, as well as furnaces in a 2x2 grid.
body: This mod makes the crafting table more difficult and adds items such as a saw, scissors, hammer (only as a crafting table item) and a crafting panel. This mod also adds crafting recipes for wood and stone picks, as well as furnaces in a 2x2 grid. If you like mods that complicate the gameplay, you'll definitely like this one.Fabric requires a mod fabric API
